{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Akura troops
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] considers joining the [[Akura troops]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
